epidemiology.diagnosticCriteria: Clinical diagnosis of depigmented macules; Wood lamp examination

publicHealthSystem.controlRate: High with early treatment and phototherapy access

regionalSpecificities.diagnosisCriteria: Dermatology diagnosis with Wood lamp availability
regionalSpecificities.treatmentProtocol: Topical corticosteroids or calcineurin inhibitors, phototherapy (NB-UVB), camouflage; systemic therapy for extensive disease
regionalSpecificities.regionalChallenges: Access to phototherapy in some regions
